status.description: The finalization status of the payment transaction. `SUCCEEDED` — payment completed (paid, authorized, refunded, etc.). `FAILED` — payment did not complete (failed, expired, or invalidated). `CANCELLED` — payment was explicitly cancelled or voided. `PENDING` — payment is still in progress (created, pending, or attempted).

payment_transaction_id.description: The unique session identifier of the payment transaction. Corresponds to the `session_id` used when initiating the payment.

last_updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the payment transaction last changed state. Use this to detect stale or recently updated records.

source.description: The mechanism that last determined the current payment status.
